title: Follow the Guide in St Paul de Vence | Mas du Chanoine
description: Follow the Guide in St Paul de Vence: French Riviera event near our guesthouse.

breadcrumb.label: Follow the Guide in St Paul de Vence

paragraphs: To discover our beautiful village, nothing better than the guided tours offered by the Tourist Office. In 1 hour, you will learn stories and see the village from a very different angle. Many topics are covered: History and Heritage, the Folon chapel, the Maeght Foundation, Following Marc Chagall, Petanque lesson… For a small fee (7 euros per person), you will learn many good things about the city.
eventName: Follow the Guide in St Paul de Vence
